name: Blue Ribbon Burgers
recipeInstructions:
Use 1 4-oz can of mushroom stems and pieces.
1. Mix the ground beef, Worcestershire sauce, salt, garlic salt, and pepper in a bowl until combined.
2. Shape the mixture into 12 thin patties, each about 4-inches in diameter.
3. In a separate bowl, mix the cream cheese and blue cheese crumbles.
4. Spread a layer of the cheese mixture onto each patty, covering almost to the edge.
5. Press a mushroom piece onto each patty, ensuring it is pressed into the cheese.
6. Place another patty on top of each patty to seal them together firmly.
7. Broil or grill the patties 4-inches from the heat source, turning once halfway through cooking.
8. Cook until the desired doneness is reached and the cheese is melted, about 10 to 15 minutes.
